name: ACHIEVE LIFE SCIENCES, INC.
summary: Achieve Life Sciences, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing cytisinicline, a plant-based compound, as a treatment for nicotine dependence, including smoking cessation. The company is pursuing FDA approval for cytisinicline and is exploring its use for additional methods of nicotine dependence beyond smoking. Achieve relies on third-party manufacturers for cytisinicline supply and is focused on commercialization efforts pending regulatory approval.

products.name: cytisinicline
products.description: Plant-based compound in clinical development for nicotine dependence treatment, including smoking cessation, seeking FDA approval.

partnerships.description: Third-party manufacturers provide cytisinicline supply and are required to receive and maintain FDA approval.
